name: canvas-mcp
description: Read-only Canvas MCP server for courses, assignments, planning, content, and collaboration workflows.
long_description: Canvas MCP is a local-first Model Context Protocol server for Canvas. It connects to a user-provided Canvas domain and bearer token, then exposes read-only student-focused tools for courses, assignments, planner items, announcements, modules, files, discussions, quizzes, groups, conversations, and schedules.

canvas_domain.title: Canvas domain
canvas_domain.description: Canvas host name, for example canvas.northwestern.edu.

canvas_api_token.title: Canvas API token
canvas_api_token.description: Canvas bearer token used for API requests.
